name: Service Landing Page
summary: Entry point for a government service with hero banner, value proposition, and primary call-to-action.
whenToUse: Main entry page for a citizen-facing service
Service overview before directing to forms

structure.header: GoabAppHeader with service name and navigation links
structure.hero: GoabHeroBanner with heading, subtitle, and primary CTA button
structure.content: GoabPageBlock with service features in GoabGrid card layout

requiredElements: Hero with concise value proposition (1-2 sentences)
Brief description of what the service does

imports: import { GoabOneColumnLayout, GoabAppHeader, GoabHeroBanner, GoabPageBlock, GoabGrid, GoabContainer, GoabButton, GoabAppFooter } from '@abgov/react-components';
codeExample.jsx:
Apply Check eligibility Contact

Alberta families may qualify for subsidized child care based on income and family size.

navigate('/eligibility')}>Check eligibility

What you can get

Reduced fees

Pay less for licensed child care based on your family income.

Multiple children

Subsidy applies to each child in licensed care.

notes: GoabHeroBanner should only appear on landing pages, not interior pages
Keep hero subtitle to 1-2 sentences maximum
Primary CTA should be the most important action for 80% of users
Use sentence casing for headings (capitalize first word only)
